title: Find First and Last Position of Element in Sorted Array
pattern: Binary Search â€” Boundary Search (Lower/Upper Bound)
coreIdea: Find the first and last occurrence of a target in a sorted array by running two separate binary searches, one biased to continue searching left after finding a match (for first occurrence), one biased right (for last occurrence).
recognitionCues: array is sorted with possible duplicates
asks for range/first-and-last position of a value
approach: First occurrence: standard binary search, but on finding a match, record it and continue searching the left half (high = mid-1) instead of stopping. Last occurrence: same but continue searching right half (low = mid+1) on a match.
